Tests the Math.atan2 function with positive zero and Number.MAX_VALUE as arguments.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of the `Math.atan2` function in JavaScript. It verifies that when `Math.atan2` is called with `+0` as the first argument and `Number.MAX_VALUE` as the second argument, the result is `+0`. This test ensures that the `Math.atan2` function correctly handles edge cases involving positive zero and large numbers. The code is part of a test suite to validate the mathematical accuracy and compliance of the JavaScript `Math` library with expected standards.
